summary: The diff shows documentation and project state updates, along with a frontend file summary that describes version 50 features (including the delete contact request functionality). However, there is no evidence of actual deployment artifacts — no dfx.json changes, no canister deployment logs, no Candid interface updates, no deployment scripts executed, and no IC mainnet deployment records. The project_state.json marks the feature as 'pending', confirming deployment has not occurred. The diff appears to only update documentation and project state tracking files, not perform the actual IC mainnet deployment.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deploy the current version 50 of the application (including the delete contact requests feature in the admin dashboard) to the Internet Computer mainnet.
missing_requirements.reason: No actual deployment to IC mainnet is evidenced in the diff. The project_state.json marks the deployment as 'pending'. There are no deployment artifacts, canister IDs, dfx deploy outputs, or any IC mainnet deployment records present. The frontend-file-summaries.txt only describes the state of frontend files but does not constitute a deployment.

hallucinated_features.description: Addition of a deployment verification checklist and expanded troubleshooting section to RUN-LOCAL-AND-DEPLOY-IC.md
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request is a deployment-only request with the constraint 'Do not modify any application code'. Modifying documentation files goes beyond the strict deployment-only scope and was not explicitly requested.
